articles.title: Alchemist
articles.content:
An Alchemist is an expert at combining reagents to produce mystical effects. Alchemists use their creations to give life and to leech it away. Alchemy is an old tradition and its versatility has long been valued during times of war and peace. Among the major products of alchemy are oils, potions and improvised weapons.

The Alchemist uses various reagents chosen for the essences they provide. These essences are manipulated and combined in various ways to produce produce an end effect. The mechanisms and techniques employed are what what leads to a different outcome.

While many alchemical products may also be produced by an Herbalist,  Oils, Acids and other improvised weapons are the domain of alchemists while health related portions are unique to herblaists.

There are six essences: Air, Earth, Fire, Life, Shadow, and Water. Each brings unique properties to the mixture.

articles.title: Courtesan
articles.content:
Being a courtesan is not a "lesser" profession and its existence is taken for granted. While sex is part of the role (and some courtesans never grow beyond this), being a higher ranking courtesan is much more and involves the overall enjoyment of one's company.

One might acquire the services of a courtesan for several reasons, a single sex act, an evening of entertainment, an escort for a night out or to take to a party. None of these is frowned upon in per se in Haven; the specifics however may cause people to judge.

Courtesans, both male and female, are performing artists and entertainers trained in various  styles, such as dance, music and singing, as well as being proficient conversationalists and hosts. A skilled courtesan knows how to relate to their customer and a deeper level, knowing when to speak and when to listen. They are part entertainer, part companion, and part confidant/therapist. 

Because of the closeness to a customer that a courtesan may achieve they are sometimes used as spies. The more honourable ones whoever look down upon the mere idea of betraying a confidence.
articles.workplace: While there are definitely those who work the streets or from their own homes, most work in one of the "houses" run for that purpose.
articles.socialStatus: Depends on the courtesan's training and standing within the profession. Higher level courtesans are sought out by customers of any gender or social standing.

articles.title: Herbalist
articles.content:
An Herbalist is an expert at identifying plants/fungi and combining them to produce mystical effects. Their output can be anythong from herbal teas, to remedys and poultices, to powerful potions.

Some  @[Alchemists](profession:758e627f-aaca-4874-80a5-7a28af7a97dd)  make potions  similar to those of an herbalist but health related potions are unique to herblaists.

There are six essences: Air, Earth, Fire, Life, Shadow, and Water. Each brings unique properties to the mixture.
